2606.15225.title: Edu-Theater: A Data-Efficient Agent Framework for Scalable Learner Behavior Simulation through Staging Roll-Call
2606.15225.paper_summary: Large-scale learner-task interaction data are crucial for intelligent educational systems but are costly to collect and constrained by privacy and learner engagement. Learner simulators play a critical role in simulating scalable learner behavior without the need for continuous involvement of real learners. However, existing methods are predominantly \textbf{individual-centric}, pairing a simulator with each learner to iteratively infer latent knowledge states from dense interaction histories, which is both data- and computation-intensive, and fragile in cold-start scenarios. We propose a \textbf{cohort-aware roll-call simulation paradigm} that first constructs cohort-level proficiency priors and refines individual learner states through a small number of targeted diagnostic queries. Based on this paradigm, we introduce \textbf{Edu-Theater}, an LLM-powered agent system that performs cohort-aware learner simulation via a teacher agent and retrospective roll-call probing over learner logs. Edu-Theater enables scalable future behavior simulation without the need for dense per-learner histories. Experiments on two real-world datasets demonstrate that Edu-Theater achieves higher simulation accuracy with significantly fewer LLM calls, producing synthetic data that enhances downstream applications such as adaptive testing.
2606.15225.paper_summary_zh: 大型學習者-任務互動數據對於智能教育系統至關重要，但收集成本高昂，並受到隱私和學習者參與度的限制。學習者模擬器在無需持續涉及真實學習者的情況下，對模擬可擴展的學習者行為發揮了關鍵作用。然而，現有的方法主要是\textbf{以個體為中心}，將模擬器與每個學習者配對，通過密集的互動歷史來迭代推斷潛在的知識狀態，這既數據密集又計算密集，並且在冷啟動場景中脆弱。我們提出了一種\textbf{關注群體的點名模擬範式}，該範式首先構建群體級別的熟練度先驗，並通過少量針對性的診斷查詢來細化個別學習者的狀態。基於這一範式，我們引入了\textbf{Edu-Theater}，一個由LLM驅動的代理系統，通過教師代理和對學習者日誌的回顧性點名探測來執行關注群體的學習者模擬。Edu-Theater使未來行為模擬可擴展，而無需密集的每位學習者歷史。對兩個真實世界數據集的實驗表明，Edu-Theater在顯著減少LLM調用的情況下實現了更高的模擬準確性，生成的合成數據增強了下游應用，如自適應測試。
2606.15225.author: Weibo Gao et.al.
2606.15225.authors: Weibo Gao, Qi Liu, Linan Yue, Zheng Zhang, Yichao Du, Fangzhou Yao, Ao Yu, Zhenya Huang, Shijin Wang
